sn15.10:1.1:
1
Ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā rājagahe vihārati gijjhakūṭe pabbate. Tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi: "bhikkhavo"ti.
sn15.10:1.2: "Bhadante"ti te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ. Bhagavā etadavoca:
sn15.10:2.1:
2
"Anamataggoyaṁ, bhikkhave, saṁsāro … pe … ekapuggalassa, bhikkhave, kappaṁ sandhāvato saṁsarato siyā evaṁ mahā aṭṭhikaṅkalo aṭṭhipuñjo aṭṭhirāsi yathāyaṁ vepullo pabbato, sace saṁhārako assa, sambhatañca na vinasseyya. Taṁ kissa hetu? Anamataggoyaṁ, bhikkhave, saṁsāro … pe … alaṁ vimuccitun"ti.
sn15.10:3.1:
3
Idamavoca bhagavā. Idaṁ vatvāna sugato athāparaṁ etadavoca satthā:
sn15.10:3.2:
4
"Ekassekena kappena,
puggalassaṭṭhisañcayo;
Siyā pabbatasamo rāsi,
iti vuttaṁ mahesinā.
sn15.10:3.3:
5
So kho panāyaṁ akkhāto,
vepullo pabbato mahā;
Uttaro gijjhakūṭassa,
magadhānaṁ giribbaje.
sn15.10:3.4:
6
Yato ca ariyasaccāni,
sammappaññāya passati;
Dukkhaṁ dukkhasamup pādaṁ,
dukkhassa ca atikkamaṁ;
Ariyaṁ caṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ,
dukkhūpasamagāminaṁ.
sn15.10:4.1:
7
Sa sattakkhattuṁparamaṁ,
sandhāvitvāna puggalo;
Dukkhassantakaro hoti,
sabbasaṁyojanakkhayā"ti.
